panels.title: Temperature — all RTDs (raw = labjack, corrected = labjack_cal)
Temperature (K) — raw vs corrected, all three RTDs

targets.query:
from(bucket: "xsphere")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temperature" and r._field == "value_k" and r.sensor_type == "rtd" and (r.source == "labjack" or r.source == "labjack_cal"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with series: r.source + " rtd" + r.channel }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "series"])
  |> group(columns: ["series"])

panels.title: Latest values — all RTDs (raw vs corrected)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "xsphere")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temperature" and r.sensor_type == "rtd" and (r.source == "labjack" or r.source == "labjack_cal") and (r._field == "value_k" or r._field == "value_c" or r._field == "resistance_ohm"))
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["source", "channel", "_field", "_value"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["source", "channel"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["channel", "source"])
